## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / scanner
- [ ] New AI attack category
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run test:all` passes locally
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests (or explain why tests don't apply below)
- [ ] Tested against the demo API (`npm run demo` + `npm run scan`)

## Checklist

- [ ] No new TypeScript `any` without justification
- [ ] `security.config.yml` schema changes are backward-compatible or include a migration note
- [ ] README / docs updated if a user-facing feature changed
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, API keys, or real target URLs in code or tests

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything non-obvious about the implementation, trade-offs considered, or follow-up work. -->
